text: SPEAKER_01: Hello. SPEAKER_01: Good afternoon, Prajati. SPEAKER_01: I am speaking to Deepthi from Ulaanbaatar. SPEAKER_01: I am from Noida Sutta 18. SPEAKER_01: Hello. SPEAKER_01: Did you raise an inquiry for the last few courses? SPEAKER_01: Where do you live? SPEAKER_00: I wanted to know about the structure. SPEAKER_00: Where do you live? SPEAKER_00: I live near the sector. SPEAKER_01: Okay. SPEAKER_01: Are you comfortable for Noida Sutta 18? SPEAKER_01: Yes, I am comfortable there. SPEAKER_01: Okay, what course do you want to do? SPEAKER_01: Makeup. SPEAKER_01: Makeup and hair styling, right? SPEAKER_01: Yes. SPEAKER_01: Okay, I will tell you Prakti, in the courses we have, you have a complete course of basic to advanced. SPEAKER_01: Basic course is of 2-3 months and advanced is of 4-5 months. SPEAKER_01: In this, your course contains self-cooperative day and night party makeup, haldi look, mehendi engagement, and classical bridal. SPEAKER_01: In three types of bridal, you will learn modern, traditional, high fantasy, glam, SD, elders, fantasy completely. SPEAKER_01: I was telling you that you also get internship program in this. SPEAKER_01: Also, you get international pathway program and personality development. SPEAKER_01: There is a 20% part-time salary. SPEAKER_01: 80% practical part of it. SPEAKER_01: Okay? SPEAKER_01: And in this, events related things are taught to you. SPEAKER_01: Work behind the scenes at the top fashion and beauty events. SPEAKER_01: In these, you will get to work. SPEAKER_01: On which you will also get a certificate. SPEAKER_01: Okay? SPEAKER_01: The course you are doing in LACME, you will get the certification separately. SPEAKER_01: Okay? SPEAKER_01: Okay. SPEAKER_01: This course is basic. SPEAKER_01: You have to advance. SPEAKER_01: Advance. SPEAKER_01: Advanced course is for Rs.1,50,000. SPEAKER_01: Your discount amount will be around Rs.90,000. SPEAKER_01: I will WhatsApp you in detail once. SPEAKER_01: When can you come to Aaj Aakal for the course details? SPEAKER_00: Can I tell you in a little while? SPEAKER_00: Is your same number on WhatsApp? SPEAKER_01: Yes, my same number is on WhatsApp. SPEAKER_00: Okay, okay. SPEAKER_00: Will you send me the basic and advanced of the course? SPEAKER_01: Yes, I will send you. SPEAKER_00: And I wanted to ask you one more thing. SPEAKER_00: You can join even if you are underage, right? SPEAKER_01: How old are you? SPEAKER_01: 17. SPEAKER_01: Yes, you can join. SPEAKER_01: If they want to work with skill base, then of course, children can join. SPEAKER_01: And let me tell you, in April and May, I get the most discount offers due to our 12 pass out children. SPEAKER_01: So, the most discount offer goes in April and May. SPEAKER_01: So, if you want to do it for these people, then you can do it better. SPEAKER_01: There is also an EMI option on the payment part. SPEAKER_01: You can also do one go, you can also do EMI. SPEAKER_01: Okay, as easy as it seems. SPEAKER_01: If you want demo classes, then we can also provide that. SPEAKER_01: Once you visit, if you have any questions, then I will be able to clear it. SPEAKER_00: Okay, okay, you tell me that, tell me about demo classes. SPEAKER_01: I can't share the fees structure on whatsapp because the fees are given on the basis of our discount code. SPEAKER_01: I will give you an idea, it will cost around 50 and your advance will cost around 90. SPEAKER_00: Okay, so you are telling me without or involving the discount? SPEAKER_01: Yes, I am telling you almost by adding the discount. SPEAKER_01: When you get the final discount, you will also get the discount on behalf of your ID card. SPEAKER_01: So when I will do the registration process, then I will be able to tell you the final fees. SPEAKER_01: Okay. SPEAKER_01: So when can you come? SPEAKER_01: Do you want to do Prakriti or do you want to do it at your home? SPEAKER_00: Actually, my sister wants to do it, I don't want to do it. SPEAKER_00: Okay, okay. SPEAKER_00: What is your sister's name? SPEAKER_00: Prakriti. SPEAKER_00: Okay, and yours? SPEAKER_00: My name is Gungunath. SPEAKER_01: Okay, okay. SPEAKER_01: Okay, okay. SPEAKER_01: Yes, I am her sister. SPEAKER_01: Can you stop the nurses for me? SPEAKER_01: Otherwise, I will share details on your number. SPEAKER_00: Okay, tell me when will you come? SPEAKER_00: I will tell you very soon. SPEAKER_00: Yes, yes, no issues. SPEAKER_00: Sure, sure. SPEAKER_01: Okay, thank you.
